title: Afrobeat & Caribbean Vibes Night
description: Feel the heat of tropical vibes! This night brings the best of Afrobeat and Caribbean music together. Great energy, great dancing, perfect for couples who love rhythm.

title: Lines of Play Opening Reception
description: World Cup-themed group exhibition featuring 30+ local artists. Great conversation starter, free wine, and an excuse to wander through art with your date.

title: Poetry For Lovers: Custom Typewriter Poetry
description: Intimate typewriter poetry experience. Create custom poems together and leave with a keepsake. Romantic, unique, and way more memorable than a typical date.

title: Glow Nights After Hours at Georgia Aquarium
description: Adults-only glow party inside the aquarium. Dance, drink, and explore exhibits with neon vibes. Ultra-cool date night that beats the typical dinner reservation.

title: Young the Giant + Cold War Kids
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park
description: Indie rock concert under the stars. Pack a picnic, bring a blanket, and enjoy great music in Atlanta's beautiful outdoor venue. Classic summer date.

title: Cocktails in the Garden
description: Weekly event: drinks, live music, and gorgeous garden views. Stroll through flowers, sip cocktails, and enjoy the romantic atmosphere outdoors.

title: Atlanta Comedy Experience
description: Standup comedy show with local and touring comedians. Laughter is the best medicine and perfect for a fun, low-pressure date night.

title: Helium Comedy Club: Jess Hilarious
description: Jess Hilarious brings her hilarious act to Atlanta. Great burgers, cold drinks, and belly laughs. Perfect for couples who don't take themselves too seriously.

title: Morgan Jay: The Goofy Guy Tour
description: Musician-comedian Morgan Jay performs at the iconic Fox Theatre. Unique blend of comedy and live music in one of Atlanta's most beautiful venues.

title: Salsa Bachata Havana Nights @ La Industria
description: Sunday salsa and bachata dancing. Includes class, dinner, and social dancing. Learn together, laugh at mistakes, and end the night holding each other on the dance floor.

title: Candela: Monthly Latin Fusion Party
description: Atlanta's hottest Latin fusion party with DJ EU, Lemnxx, and Aveza. High energy, great cocktails, and a dance floor that stays packed till 3AM.

title: Vegan Takeover at Kamayan Filipino Restaurant
description: Special vegan Filipino feast. Unique food experience for adventurous couples. Bold flavors, beautiful presentation, and something different from typical date night fare.

title: Love and Music - Atlanta!
description: Romantic piano concert immersion. VIP cocktail hour followed by a candlelit piano performance. Perfect for couples looking for a classy, intimate evening.

title: Moms Unhinged Standup Comedy
location: Wild Heaven Beer: West End Brewery & Gardens
description: Outdoor comedy show at Atlanta's best brewery. Craft beers, food trucks, and standup comedy under the stars. Casual, fun, and great for laid-back couples.

title: Where Being Takes Root Opening Reception
description: Art exhibition opening at Georgia State University. Free, sophisticated, and a great way to spend a Thursday evening exploring art with your partner.
